title: 待月弑杀
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年）8月11日，上海岑家。六名嫌疑人各有动机。在这座隐藏着杀人魔传说的宅邸里，真凶就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Shanghai mansion, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Shanghai mansion murder mystery. Traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, six silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
